x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Business rules on incident and task tables can intercept or modify Now Assist API calls, causing unexpected behavior. Customer-created rules must be reviewed before enablement to prevent conflicts.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review customer-created Business Rules on incident and task. Test each in sub-production with Now Assist enabled. Disable or modify rules that intercept Now Assist API calls. Target: <50 custom active BRs on incident/task.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_36f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c50
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Business rules on incident and task tables can intercept or modify Now Assist API calls, causing unexpected behavior. Customer-created rules must be reviewed before enablement to prevent conflicts.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Business Rules on Incident / Task</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    ga.addQuery('collection', 'IN', 'incident,task');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom active Business Rules on incident/task';

    if (count < 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low Business Rule customization on incident/task (' + count + ' custom BRs). Now Assist and AI Agent operations are unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count < 100) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom Business Rules on incident/task. Moderate customization — test Now Assist and AI Agents in sub-production to identify conflicts before go-live.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom Business Rules on incident/task. High customization density creates significant risk of Now Assist and AI Agent conflicts — review and reduce before enablement.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000329</number><order>150</order><remediation_guidance>Review customer-created Business Rules on incident and task. Test each in sub-production with Now Assist enabled. Disable or modify rules that intercept Now Assist API calls. Target: <50 custom active BRs on incident/task.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>36f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c50</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Business Rules on Incident / Task</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_36f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c50</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
